heading: Study of the feasibility of a North American National Security Program
label: 1751 Study of the feasibility of a North American National Security Program
notes: Abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service and Transfer of FunctionsFor abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service, transfer of functions, and treatment of related references, see note set out under .section 1551 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The President shall conduct a study of the feasibility of establishing a North American National Security Program to enhance the mutual security and safety of the United States, Canada, and Mexico.

children.heading: Preclearance
children.label: 1 Preclearance
children.text: The feasibility of establishing a program enabling foreign national travelers to the United States to submit voluntarily to a preclearance procedure established by the Department of State and the Immigration and Naturalization Service to determine whether such travelers are admissible to the United States under . Consideration shall be given to the feasibility of expanding the preclearance program to include the preclearance both of foreign nationals traveling to Canada and foreign nationals traveling to Mexico.section 1182 of this title

children.heading: Preinspection
children.label: 2 Preinspection
children.text: The feasibility of expanding preinspection facilities at foreign airports as described in . Consideration shall be given to the feasibility of expanding preinspections to foreign nationals on air flights destined for Canada and Mexico, and the cross training and funding of inspectors from Canada and Mexico.section 1225a of this title

children.heading: Conditions
children.label: 3 Conditions
children.text: A determination of the measures necessary to ensure that the conditions required by are satisfied, including consultation with experts recognized for their expertise regarding the conditions required by that section.section 1225a(a)(5) of this title

children.heading: Report
children.label: c Report
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the President shall submit to the appropriate committees of Congress a report setting forth the findings of the study conducted under subsection (a).May 14, 2002

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this section.
